# 2026-03-19 — Thursday

Clear morning. Ran along the avenida.

Spent an hour on a bug that turned out to be a stale cache. Not the first time.

Re-read my own PR from yesterday. Disliked three comments I'd left. Edited them.

Worked on the the trainer pass. 0.82 is the right knob; 0.86 over-merged, 0.92 missed the obvious near-dupes. Kept it.

Priya pushed the numpy bump. Broke one test. Fixed it without regret — the test was wrong.

Hiked Lisbon on Saturday. Wind hard enough to lean into.

Hiked Sintra on Saturday. Wind hard enough to lean into.

Hiked Serra da Estrela on Saturday. Wind hard enough to lean into.

Most of my bad code is written while trying to prove I was right earlier.
